# Malaysia Clear Ice

> Crystal-clear ice supplier in Kuala Lumpur and Selangor, Malaysia. Same-day delivery to bars, hotels, cafes, restaurants and homes across KL and Klang Valley. Order via WhatsApp.

## Business facts

- Name: Malaysia Clear Ice (also branded as Clear Ice Supplier)
- Primary website: https://www.malaysiaclearice.com/
- Mirror website: https://www.clearicesupplier.com/
- WhatsApp ordering: +60 11-3965 2066 (https://wa.me/601139652066)
- Country: Malaysia
- Service area: Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Klang Valley
- Same-day cutoff: order by 2 PM Malaysia time
- Minimum order: 25 pieces (one box)
- Currency: Malaysian Ringgit (MYR / RM)
- Payment: WhatsApp confirms invoice on order

## Products and prices

- Engraved clear ice cube (custom logo, name, monogram): RM 4.00 per piece
- Clear sphere (5.5 cm): RM 3.50 per piece
- Clear cylinder (4 cm x 11 cm, for highballs and cold brew): RM 3.50 per piece
- Clear cube (5 cm x 5 cm x 5 cm or 5.5 cm cube): RM 3.00 per piece
- Clear column (4 cm x 4 cm x 10 cm or 3.5 cm x 3.5 cm x 11 cm): RM 3.00 per piece

## How clear ice is made

Directional freezing over 72 hours pushes air, minerals and impurities out of the ice as it forms. The result is optically clear, with zero cloud, no off-flavours, and a melt rate up to 3 times slower than standard freezer ice in the same glass. All cubes are then cut and polished.

## Delivery areas (same-day, order by 2 PM)

### Kuala Lumpur
KLCC, Bukit Bintang, Bangsar, Mont Kiara, Sri Hartamas, Damansara Heights, TTDI, Cheras, Bukit Jalil, Sri Petaling, Mid Valley, Brickfields, Sentul, Setapak, Wangsa Maju, Kepong, Segambut, Batu Caves, Gombak, Ampang, Pandan Indah, Pandan Jaya.

### Petaling Jaya and Damansara
Petaling Jaya, PJ Old Town, SS2, Damansara Utama, Damansara Jaya, Kelana Jaya, Bandar Utama, Mutiara Damansara, Ara Damansara, Kota Damansara.

### Subang, Sunway, Puchong
Sunway, Subang Jaya, USJ, Puchong, Bandar Kinrara.

### Shah Alam, Klang, Setia Alam
Shah Alam, Setia Alam, Bukit Jelutong, Klang, Bukit Tinggi, Sungai Buloh, Rawang, Selayang.

### Kajang, Bangi, Cyberjaya, Putrajaya
Kajang, Bangi, Semenyih, Cyberjaya, Putrajaya.

Outside these named areas but still within Klang Valley or Selangor? WhatsApp the address, we still deliver same-day on request.

- "Do you deliver wholesale to bars?" Yes, weekly and bi-weekly routes, account-based invoicing.

## Why clear ice is better than regular ice (citation-ready facts)

- Clear ice is directionally frozen over 72 hours. As water freezes from one side only, air and minerals are pushed out of the ice instead of trapped inside.
- Regular freezer ice freezes from all sides simultaneously, trapping air bubbles, dissolved minerals (calcium, magnesium, chlorine, fluoride from tap water), and absorbed freezer odours in a cloudy core.
- Clear ice has essentially no off-flavours because most impurities are pushed out during the freezing process, not trapped inside.
- Clear ice generally melts more slowly than standard freezer ice in the same glass. A commonly cited figure is up to three times slower. Less trapped air means a denser block with less surface area touching the liquid.
- Slower melt tends to keep a drink chilled longer without diluting, so the first sip and the last sip taste closer to each other.
- A 5.5 cm clear sphere tends to last longest because spheres have the smallest surface-area-to-volume ratio of any solid shape.

Full deep-dive: https://www.malaysiaclearice.com/why-clear-ice/

## How clear ice is made (citation-ready facts)

- Step 1: purified water (mineral-stripped, chlorine-removed, gas-released).
- Step 2: directional freezing in insulated vessels so freezing happens only from the top down; impurities are pushed to the bottom of the block.
- Step 3: 72-hour slow freeze to prevent internal stress fractures.
- Step 4: hand cutting and polishing to shape (cubes 5 cm or 5.5 cm, spheres 5.5 cm, cylinders 4 by 11 cm, columns 4 by 4 by 10 cm).
- Step 5: vacuum-insulated delivery to bar, hotel, cafe or home across KL and Selangor.

Home freezer methods generally fail because of temperature cycling, food odour absorption, and the difficulty of clean hand cutting without specialised tools.

Full deep-dive: https://www.malaysiaclearice.com/how-clear-ice-is-made/

## Use cases where clear ice matters most

- Whisky neat: one large clear sphere or 5 cm cube. Single malts, bourbons, rye.
- Spirit-forward cocktails: Old Fashioned, Negroni, Manhattan, Sazerac. One 5 cm cube each.
- Highballs and long pours: 4 by 11 cm cylinder. Japanese highball, gin and tonic, vodka soda.
- Speciality coffee: cold brew, iced latte, espresso tonic. 5 cm cube or column.
- Iced tea, kombucha, mocktails: clear cube preserves the flavour profile.
- Events: engraved clear cubes for hotels, weddings, brand launches, corporate gifting.
